sections.paragraph: m. pl. (root גָּנַף), a word only found in Ezekiel, forces, army, Eze 12:14 17:21 38:6 , Eze 38:9 39:4 to this answers the Ch. אֲגַף, גַּף a wing, hence prop. the wings of an army, comp. כְּנָפַיִם Isa 8:8 in the same manner is the word wings applied in Arabic and Chaldee: compare my Commentary on the passage cited.
